item.title: OnAir 3.0.3
item.description:
What's New in OnAir 3.0.3

  • Complete rewrite from Python to native Swift/macOS for faster performance and smaller app size.
  • Native menu bar integration with improved icon refresh across multiple displays.
  • Floating shortcut confirmation window with fade-in/fade-out animations.
  • Teams setup screen auto-dismisses when third-party API is detected.
  • Focus Mode validation on save with system Focus mode name verification.
  • Fixed text field cursor and selection visibility across all screens.
  • Fixed SQLite multi-threaded crash with serialized database access.
  • Fixed sessions remaining "Ongoing" after configuration reload.
  • Splash screen displayed during app initialization.
  • Improved configuration screen with Title Case labels and aligned controls.
  • Native macOS text fields with proper caret and selection highlighting.
